homeHeadline: A cozy diary for her sweetest doll collection.
homeDescription: A soft little place for every doll she loves, the stories behind them, and a birthday note kept just for the two of you.
bioTitle: The girl this diary belongs to
bioText: She is the kind of person who can make small things feel precious. Every doll here is part of her gentle little universe: soft colors, cute faces, tiny outfits, and memories worth keeping.
birthdayHeadline: Happy birthday 🎂 Nadia, my favorite person.
birthdayIntro: You bring laughter and radiate positivity everywhere you go. You’re brilliant, talented, and incredibly kind-hearted. Thank you for always treating me so well, and for being the best friend and girlfriend I could ever ask for. My life is so much brighter with you in it.

birthdayWishes.title: For you
paras: My wish for you is that you feel deeply loved in every single moment. Take time to appreciate the incredible person you are, each and every day.
Here’s to your vibrant health and strength. May you always be surrounded by kind-hearted people who lift you up.
Success is bound to follow as you build your career and your own brand. You deserve true joy in everything you touch.

birthdayWishes.title: For us
paras: As for us, let's keep creating tiny, beautiful memories together. I love our everyday conversations that make us feel right at home.
I can't wait to cross continents by your side. Let's explore every corner of this world and never stop chasing fun new adventures.
Let’s always choose love over any fear or doubt. No matter what comes our way, let's keep growing side by side for an eternity.
